---
name: Pull request
about: Submit a contribution to Interview Ready
---

## What this PR does

Describe what you built, changed, or fixed. Be specific. One paragraph is enough for most contributions.

---

## Related issue

Closes #[issue number]

Every PR must reference an open issue. If no issue exists for this change, open one first and wait for confirmation before submitting this PR.

---

## What skill or file does this affect?

- [ ] Skill 01: Interviewer
- [ ] Skill 02: Resume Writer
- [ ] Skill 03: Job Search Expert
- [ ] Skill 04: Interview Prep
- [ ] Skill 05: Mock Interviewer
- [ ] Shared profile schema
- [ ] README or documentation
- [ ] GitHub Pages site (index.html)
- [ ] Issue templates or community files
- [ ] Other (describe below)

---

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New reference file or asset
- [ ] Skill extension for a specific population or industry
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Platform port (Gemini, etc.)
- [ ] Other (describe below)

---

## Checklist

**Content standards:**
- [ ] No em dashes anywhere in any file I created or modified
- [ ] No real names used (John Doe or Jane Doe only for placeholder names)
- [ ] No personally identifiable information included
- [ ] Any profile field references match the schema in `references/user-profile-schema.md`

**License:**
- [ ] This contribution is my original work
- [ ] I agree to release this contribution under CC BY-NC 4.0
- [ ] I have credited any sources used within the files themselves

**Testing:**
- [ ] I have tested this change in a Claude session and it produces the intended behavior
- [ ] I have described my testing approach below

**Documentation:**
- [ ] I have updated any relevant README files if my change affects folder structure or usage

---

## Testing notes

Describe how you validated that your contribution works as intended. Even informal notes help. If you were unable to test, explain why.

---

## Anything else?

Add any context, screenshots, or additional information that would help the reviewer understand this PR.
